creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have fixed the 'qvwm' port which I have submitted here.
It follows to the BSD-style file system showd in the handbook.
Qvwm is another Win95-like window manager for X-Window.
I think it's more better than fvwm95.
Please take a look.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/qvwm.tgz

					Yukihiro Nakai
					<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
